original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: The CTA visual treatment applies alongside the per-section primary-CTA limit.

Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.

rules.intent: Ensure seamless, responsive assembly of baseline email sections.
rules.rule_text: Use a fixed, centered 600px email canvas. Sections render edge-to-edge at that width; all section text retains 24px left/right insets, including over full-bleed imagery or gradient backgrounds. Multi-column layouts collapse to one column at 480px; use the 12-column mental model with practical 1-column, 50/50 two-column, or approximately 40/60 image/text layouts.

quotes: **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Create consistent vertical rhythm and prevent gaps when independent sections are assembled.
rules.rule_text: Use an 8px vertical-rhythm base: all padding and margins are multiples of 8px. Each section owns 32px top and bottom internal padding and has no external margin, creating zero-gap stacking. Use 16px for heading-to-body and paragraph-to-paragraph gaps, 24px from body to a callout or CTA, and 8px from image to caption.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Maintain the approved, contrast-checked CTA treatment and accessible clickable-area size.
rules.rule_text: Use the general CTA treatment: primary buttons are Brand Blue (#00529b) with White (#ffffff) Nunito Sans Bold 16px labels, 14px 32px padding, a 48px minimum touch height, and a fully rounded 24px pill radius. Secondary CTAs use White (#ffffff) fill, a 2px Brand Blue (#00529b) border, Brand Blue label text, and the same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Keep section hierarchy focused and avoid competing primary actions.
rules.rule_text: Use no more than one primary CTA in each section.

| item | value |
|---|---|

| Section side padding | 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets. |
| Vertical rhythm | 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8. |
| Section top/bottom internal padding | **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking). |
| Heading → body gap | 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px. |
| Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette] | ** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum. |
